title: Hieracium subgracilipes
taxonomy: Hieracium subgracilipes is a species of plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a type of hawkweed, which is a common name for plants in the genus Hieracium. The genus Hieracium is often divided into several subgenera, and Hieracium subgracilipes is classified within the subgenus Pilosella. The species is native to certain regions, although the exact native range is not specified. The classification of Hieracium subgracilipes is still a subject of ongoing research and study.
